my_thoughts: Turn 1 I noted the victim posture—'who will protect me from bad teachers?' Now turn 2 flips it: 'I'll just surrender totally and the Guru does the rest.' Same external locus, different packaging. Both are seeking_passive_salvation. My none mechanism (no specific mechanism, just redefining surrender) points to something: maybe the issue isn't mechanism but frame. What IS surrender?
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in anxiety_about_false_teachers showing external_bl... Now seeing seeking_passive_salvation with none. Pattern emerging.
